title: Fix kanban board mobile responsive layout
description:
The kanban board requires horizontal scrolling on mobile devices. On narrow viewports, columns should stack vertically or collapse to a list view instead of forcing horizontal scroll.

Acceptance criteria:
- Kanban is usable on phone-width viewports without horizontal scroll
- Columns stack vertically or switch to list view on mobile
- Drag-and-drop still works on mobile (already implemented with dnd-kit)

Dev Lead.notes: Responsive layout change is clean. Vertical stack on mobile, horizontal on md+. dnd-kit unaffected.
